channel.title: Entrepreneurship Tools on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in Entrepreneurship Tools on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: AI Email Automation Tools for Non Tech Owners to Boost Small Business Efficiency in 2026
item.description: AI Email Automation for Non-Tech Owners: Boosting Small Business Efficiency in 2026 As a small business owner or solo entrepreneur, managing email communication can be overwhelming. With the constant influx of emails from customers, suppliers, and partners, it’s easy to get bogged down in responding to individual messages one by one. However, with AI email automation for non-tech owners on the rise, there’s hope that this time-consuming task can become more manageable.
